item.name: Alkonost Whistle
item.description: This whistle emits a shrill tone that summons your alkonost to your side.

mount.name: Alkonost
mount.action: Summon forth your alkonost, an imposing antlered avian native to northern Ilsabard.
mount.description: Captured in the Bozjan wilderness, this creature was passed around as a curiosity before eventually being released again. From the start, it seemed unperturbed in the presence of men, leading some to believe it was trained by an imperial beastmaster.
mount.tooltip:
How goes the training
for your avian mount?
- Luquelot
